title: aphyllon pinorum
intro: Aphyllon pinorum, also known as Diphylleia grayi, is a rare and unique flowering plant native to the Himalayan Mountains. It is known for its distinctive white flowers that turn blue after they have been wetted, and then return to white after drying. The medicinal properties of Aphyllon pinorum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an anticoagulant. Herbal preparations of Aphyllon pinorum are used to treat a variety of health issues, including cardiovascular disease, arthritis, and other conditions, and can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions.
